Container.Name: selfdashboard
Container.Overview: Self-hosted Home Server Dashboard for Unraid. Shows Docker container stats (CPU, RAM, network, logs, start/stop/restart), Unraid array and pool disks with temperatures, up to 3 Unraid servers via Connect API, weather widget (Open-Meteo free or OpenWeatherMap), calendar (iCal / CalDAV), CrowdSec live threat feed and AdGuard Home DNS stats. Heimdall-style app launcher. Drag-and-drop resizable widget layout saved across sessions. No login — designed for local network use. Dark/Light mode, German/English.

Config.Name: Dashboard Port
Config.Description: Port for the dashboard. Open http://UNRAID-IP:3000 in your browser.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent storage for apps, settings and layout.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket to read container stats and send actions.

Config.Name: Host /proc
Config.Description: Host /proc for CPU and RAM stats.

Config.Name: Host /sys
Config.Description: Host /sys for disk and CPU temperatures via hwmon.

Config.Name: Unraid Server 1 - Name
Config.Description: Display name for your first Unraid server.

Config.Name: Unraid Server 1 - Host
Config.Description: URL of your Unraid server. Example: http://192.168.1.10

Config.Name: Unraid Server 1 - API Key
Config.Description: API key from Unraid WebGUI → Settings → Management Access → API Key.

Config.Name: Unraid Server 2 - Name
Config.Description: Display name for a second Unraid server (optional).

Config.Name: Unraid Server 2 - Host
Config.Description: URL of second Unraid server (optional). Example: http://192.168.1.20

Config.Name: Unraid Server 2 - API Key
Config.Description: API key for second Unraid server (optional).

Config.Name: Unraid Server 3 - Name
Config.Description: Display name for a third Unraid server (optional).

Config.Name: Unraid Server 3 - Host
Config.Description: URL of third Unraid server (optional). Example: http://192.168.1.30

Config.Name: Unraid Server 3 - API Key
Config.Description: API key for third Unraid server (optional).

Config.Name: OpenWeatherMap API Key
Config.Description: Optional. Leave empty to use Open-Meteo (100% free, no key). Or register at openweathermap.org for a free key.

Config.Name: AdGuard URL
Config.Description: URL of your AdGuard Home instance. Example: http://192.168.1.10:3000

Config.Name: AdGuard Username
Config.Description: AdGuard Home username.

Config.Name: AdGuard Password
Config.Description: AdGuard Home password.

Config.Name: CrowdSec URL
Config.Description: CrowdSec Local API URL. Example: http://192.168.1.10:8080 — get key with: docker exec crowdsec cscli bouncers add selfdashboard

Config.Name: CrowdSec API Key
Config.Description: CrowdSec bouncer API key.

Config.Name: iCal URLs
Config.Description: Comma-separated iCal URLs. Works with Nextcloud, Google Calendar, Apple iCloud etc.

Config.Name: CalDAV URL
Config.Description: CalDAV server URL. Nextcloud example: https://nextcloud.example.com/remote.php/dav

Config.Name: CalDAV Username
Config.Description: CalDAV username.

Config.Name: CalDAV Password
Config.Description: CalDAV password.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for logs and calendar. Examples: Europe/Berlin, Europe/Vienna, Europe/Zurich, America/New_York

Config.Name: Poll Interval (ms)
Config.Description: How often Docker stats are fetched in milliseconds. 5000 = every 5 seconds.
